name: io.github.CydVilla/peckish
title: Peckish — DoorDash ordering
description: Order food on DoorDash — compare real fee-included totals; you approve every order.

environmentVariables.name: DD_CLI_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the dd-cli binary. Only needed if it is not at ~/.local/bin/dd-cli — GUI clients do not inherit your shell PATH.
